title: 1K Special XT Pack
description: This is the official 1k Special Resource Pack Made by AmarXT for Mitrowasi
body:
# 🔥 1K Special XT Pack

> **Where Style Meets Power ⚔️**

Welcome to the **1K Special XT Pack**, a custom Minecraft Java resource pack designed to give your game a fresh, stylish, and powerful look. Built for both survival players and PvP lovers, this pack enhances weapons, armors, and visuals to make every moment feel epic.

---

## ✨ Features

### ⚔️ Custom Weapons
- Redesigned swords with sharp and clean visuals  
- Stylish axes and bows  
- PvP-friendly textures for better focus  

### 🛡️ Armor Upgrade
- Unique diamond & netherite armor styles  
- Dark, modern, and futuristic looks  
- Clean visibility during combat  

### 🎨 Custom Paintings
- Anime-style artwork  
- Funny meme paintings 😄  
- Custom XT-themed designs  

### 🎮 Visual Enhancements
- Improved color balance  
- Smooth and detailed textures  
- Better in-game clarity  

---

## ⚙️ Performance
- Lightweight and optimized  
- No lag experience  
- Works smoothly on low-end PCs  

---

## 📦 Version
**v1.0 – Initial Release**

---

## 🚀 Coming Soon
- More custom weapons (Trident, Crossbow)  
- Enchantment glow effects ✨  
- UI improvements (Hotbar, Inventory)  
- More custom paintings  

---

## 📥 Installation
1. Download the pack  
2. Open Minecraft  
3. Go to **Options > Resource Packs**  
4. Click **Open Pack Folder**  
5. Paste the file and enable it  

---

## ❤️ Support
If you like this pack, don’t forget to support and share!
